chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6088 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ HEARING OF CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.23032/2024. 2. For order on office objections as at ‘A’. 3. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 28th October 2025 Syed Shoa-un-Nabi, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Altamash Arab, Advocate for Respondents No.2&3. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General. -*-*-*-*-*- By consent of all learned counsel, Begum Safia Hyderi present in Court is impleaded as party to the proceeding. Learned counsel for respondents No.2&3 submits that medical bill of the widow of petitioner would be processed, subject to all exceptions, expeditiously as soon as possible. Petitioner and her counsel are satisfied. Accordingly, petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
